message:
Merge pull request #6 from llm-d/dependabot/docker/golang-1.26

deps(docker): bump golang from 1.24 to 1.26

files.patch:
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # Supports multi-arch: linux/amd64, linux/arm64
 
 # --- Build stage ---
-FROM golang:1.24 AS builder
+FROM golang:1.26 AS builder
 
 WORKDIR /workspace
